title: Integration Associate (Post-M&A)
company_context: UK AI-enabled lettings/property platform; roll-up acquirer of estate agencies. $93M raised Feb 2026, scaling to 1,500. Post-M&A integration function is central to the roll-up thesis.
momentum_flag: STRONG — same $93M / 300→1,500 expansion; integration is the engine of the roll-up so headcount here is durable
biggest_lever: Cross-functional execution under ambiguity (operational, client and team integration of newly-acquired agencies) maps to Ryan's 'team coordination + cross-functional execution across fast-moving priorities' FA experience.
biggest_risk: Narrower delivery scope than a true founder's-associate — executes alongside an Integration Manager rather than owning end-to-end; less agent-building leverage; weaker operator-spike than the Operations Associate sibling role.
apply_move: Apply via Greenhouse. Use only as a secondary Dwelly application if the Operations Associate generalist seat is the stronger primary; lead with cross-functional coordination and stakeholder-management evidence.
availability_note: Re-verified LIVE via Greenhouse boards-api (dwelly) 2026-06-10. NOTE: first_published 2026-02-19 but updated/refreshed 2026-06-08 (2 days ago) = REPOST -> treated as fresh, recency held high (G=85). callback_op unchanged 74.
why_fits_operator_intent: Operator/execution role (not sales/CS) but more specialised on M&A integration delivery; ranked below the generalist Operations Associate.
